svg.title: DevOps portfolio project architecture
svg.desc: Developer commits to GitHub, which triggers a four-stage GitHub Actions pipeline (lint, test, build, scan) that publishes a container image to ghcr.io. The image is then deployed to two targets: a local Kubernetes cluster (kind) running the app alongside Prometheus, Grafana, and Loki for observability; and an AWS EC2 instance provisioned by Terraform and configured by Ansible, with state stored in S3.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the developer workflow look like for this project?')
sendPrompt('Show me a GitHub Actions lint step for a Flask app')
sendPrompt('What unit tests should I write for the portfolio app?')
sendPrompt('Show me a multi-stage Dockerfile build job in GitHub Actions')
sendPrompt('How do I add a Trivy image scan to my GitHub Actions workflow?')
sendPrompt('How does pushing a container image to ghcr.io work?')
sendPrompt('Show me the Kubernetes Deployment manifest for the Flask app')
sendPrompt('How do I expose a Prometheus metric from my Flask app?')
sendPrompt('Help me build a Grafana dashboard for the Flask app')
sendPrompt('How do I add Loki and Promtail to the cluster?')
sendPrompt('Show me the Terraform module for a t2.micro EC2 with security group and IAM role')
sendPrompt('Why use S3 and DynamoDB for Terraform state?')
